full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Implement baseline clustering using Gaussian Mixture Models
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How do I implement Gaussian Mixture Model clustering in Python using sklearn?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided the basic implementation using sklearn.mixture.GaussianMixture.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked sklearn documentation to confirm correct usage of the API.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Adapted the code to match the dataset and experiment setup.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Simulate equivalence constraints for constrained clustering
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How can I simulate equivalence constraints or chunklets when implementing constrained clustering for a Gaussian Mixture Model experiment?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested grouping points into chunklets and approximating them by using mean feature values.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified that chunklets in the paper enforce the same cluster assignment for grouped points.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Implemented chunklets and applied them to the dataset before fitting the GMM.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What metric should I use to compare baseline clustering and constrained clustering?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested using Adjusted Rand Index because the dataset contains ground truth labels.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified metric choice using sklearn documentation.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Integrated ARI computation into the experiment code.
